overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in cowboy attire sitting by a campfire in a rustic woodland camp. The camera slowly orbits the stationary character as smoke rises from the fire, revealing wooden shacks, makeshift shelters, and dense forest surroundings under a bright blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: woodland camp with campfire and makeshift shelters

agents.ego_description: sitting on a fallen log by the campfire, tending to the fire with occasional hand movements

entered.detail: active campfire with smoke rising and flames visible
large log serving as a seat for the character
rustic wooden cabin with weathered planks in the background
small wooden structure with sloped roof
makeshift shelter made of dark canvas or tarp
metal pot or kettle near the fire

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rustic woodland camp with a character sitting on a log by an active campfire. Wooden shacks and a tarp shelter are visible in the background amidst dense trees. The camera slowly pans around the stationary character, capturing the smoke rising from the fire and the natural daylight illuminating the clearing.

scene_state.functional_zone: woodland camp with campfire and makeshift shelters

events.description: character lifts a cup to their mouth and takes a drink

agents.ego_description: sitting by the fire, taking a drink from a cup or canteen, then returning to a resting position

entered.detail: large canvas shelter or tent visible as camera pans left
wooden barrel or crate near the fence

segments.scene_description: The camera continues its slow orbit around the character, who takes a drink from a cup while seated. The tarp shelter and right-side shack exit the frame as the left-side wooden shack becomes more prominent. The campfire remains active with smoke drifting upward, and additional camp elements like a canvas tarp and wooden barrel come into view on the left side of the clearing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, continuous orbit around a stationary character in a rustic woodland camp, shifting the focus from the overall clearing to the specific details of the camp's left side. It begins with the character sitting on a log by an active campfire, with wooden shacks and a tarp shelter nestled among dense trees under bright daylight. As the camera pans, the character takes a drink from a cup while the smoke from the fire drifts upward into the clear sky. The perspective then shifts, causing the right-side shack and tarp to exit the frame as the left-side wooden shack becomes more prominent. Finally, the movement reveals additional camp elements, including a canvas tarp and a wooden barrel, as the orbit completes its sweep of the clearing.
